sourcePrompt: An 81mm mortar emplacement, a circular pit about four meters across ringed by a low sandbag wall. The mortar stands centered - a tube on a two-legged bipod over a round baseplate, elevated steeply skyward - with a couple of ammunition crates and a stack of rounds inside the ring. Sandbags, dark gunmetal and dirt, dug-in and ready. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
